title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Cash withdrawal limit of Rs.25,000/- and purchase at Point of Sale (POS) limit of Rs. 50,000/- in a day. 
  * Ministry of Agriculture's initiative towards the credit requirements of agriculture sector.
  * Kisan Credit Card Scheme aims at providing need based and timely credit support to the farmers for their cultivation needs as well as non-farm activities in a cost effective manner.


  * Farmers under this scheme are issued a IDBI RuPay Kisan Card on their account.
  * The cards can currently be used at both ATMs and POS machines.


As RuPayKisan Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)
